input.title: Comprehensive Real Estate & Property Management Platform
input.description: An end-to-end real estate portal supporting property buying, selling, renting, and property management. Buyers and renters can search properties via interactive map integrations, perform advanced filtering, view automated valuations, and schedule tours. Real Estate Agents use a built-in CRM to manage leads, generate market reports, and host open houses. Property Managers utilize the rental suite for tenant screening, lease digitization, and rent collection.

user_classes.Buyer / Renter: An individual searching for homes to purchase or rent, saving favorites, and submitting applications/offers.
user_classes.Real Estate Agent: A licensed professional managing property listings, communicating with leads via CRM, and paying for boosted visibility.
user_classes.Property Manager / Landlord: An individual/company renting out properties, reviewing background checks, signing leases digitally, and collecting rent.
user_classes.System Admin: Internal platform administrator managing user disputes, moderating fake listings, and overseeing platform monetization.

definitions.AVM: Automated Valuation Model — an algorithm estimating property values using statistical modeling.
definitions.CMA: Comparative Market Analysis — a report agents generate to show home values based on nearby recently sold properties.
definitions.FSBO: For Sale By Owner — properties listed without a licensed real estate agent.
definitions.MLS: Multiple Listing Service — a localized database used by real estate brokers to share data about properties.

scope: Highly interactive map-based search with polygon drawing capabilities
Automated property valuations using regression models on public records
Full rental lifecycle management (application, background check, digital lease, rent payment)
Agent CRM for tracking inbound leads and setting up property tours
Monetization through agent subscriptions and 'Featured Listing' boosts
Mortgage calculator integrating live interest rate API feeds
out_of_scope: Title company escrow handling (funds for purchase go outside the platform)
Direct integration with smart home automation locks (only standard maintenance workflows are supported)
In-house appraisal generation (the platform only provides statistical estimates, not legal appraisals)
constraints: Map rendering must efficiently cluster thousands of map pins using Mapbox GL and GeoJSON rendering
Payment collection must utilize Stripe Connect to seamlessly distribute rent to landlord accounts
Sensitive tenant background data (SSN) must be piped directly to third-party providers (e.g., TransUnion) and never persisted locally

operating_environment.frontend: Next.js for SEO-critical listing pages and dynamic React dashboards for logged-in user CRM/Property Management.
operating_environment.backend: Ruby on Rails providing rapid API generation, ActiveStorage for heavy images, and Sidekiq for background jobs.
operating_environment.database: PostgreSQL with PostGIS extension for complex geospatial queries; Elasticsearch for instant text search.

FR-01.title: Registration & Dynamic Role Assignment
requirements: Users can register via Email or standard OAuth (Google/Apple)
Registration prompts users to identify as a 'Consumer' (Buyer/Renter) or 'Professional' (Agent/Manager)
Professionals must supply valid Real Estate License numbers or business EINs for manual verification

FR-02.title: User Profile Management
requirements: Consumers manage personal details, co-buyer associations, and pre-approval letters
Agents construct public-facing profiles with biographies, associated brokerages, and historical sales data

FR-03.title: Interactive Map Search Experience
requirements: Primary search yields an interactive map clustering properties tightly based on zoom level
Clicking a map pin opens a rapid-preview card showing price, beds, and hero image
Moving the map triggers automatic bounding-box queries to refresh properties natively

FR-04.title: Polygon Draw for Custom Geographic Searching
requirements: Users can draw a freeform polygon on the map to restrict search results instantly
Polygon coordinates translate precisely to PostGIS queries in the backend

FR-05.title: Deep Filtering Architecture
requirements: Search supports base filters: Price, Beds, Baths, and Home Type (Single Family, Condo, Townhouse)
Advanced filters capture Square Footage, Year Built, Lot Size, HOA Fees, and keyword inclusions (e.g., 'Pool')

FR-06.title: Saved Searches & Daily Match Emails
requirements: Users can save active filter parameters and geometries
Automated cron jobs execute daily to detect new listings matching the criteria, dispatching consolidated email digests

FR-07.title: Favorite Properties & Shared Collections
requirements: Users mark properties as 'Favorites' represented by a heart icon dynamically
Favorites can be grouped into targeted 'Collections' shared via unique links to co-buyers or agents

FR-08.title: Comprehensive Property Detail Pages
requirements: Page features a high-fidelity image carousel, detailed descriptions, and structured amenity matrices
Data includes tax history records, HOA information, and assigned neighborhood school ratings pulled from external API

FR-09.title: Immersive Virtual Media Content
requirements: Listings natively embed Matterport 3D URLs and standard YouTube/Vimeo video walkthroughs
Media displays in an isolated, screen-covering theater mode

FR-10.title: Automated Valuation Model (AVM)
requirements: Properties show a platform-generated estimated value utilizing an internal ML algorithm based on local historical sales
A line graph displays the property's estimated value trajectory over the past decade

FR-11.title: Integrated Mortgage Calculator
requirements: Dynamic calculator processes principal, interest (linked to daily average rates), estimated taxes, and homeowners insurance
Calculator state defaults to the property's current listing price

FR-12.title: Mortgage Pre-Approval Lead Generation
requirements: Users can submit a lightweight questionnaire requesting mortgage contact
Data routes securely to platform-integrated lending partners for formal pre-approval pipeline handling

FR-13.title: Agent Directory & Professional Ratings
requirements: Consumers search an indexed directory of licensed agents by name, zip code, or language
Closed clients leave 1-5 star reviews on agent profiles

FR-14.title: Property Listing Creation (Agents & FSBO)
requirements: Professionals and homeowners initiate a multi-step wizard to publish new listings
Validates precise geo-coordinates parsing standard postal addresses into latitude/longitude natively

FR-15.title: Public Records & Historical Timeline
requirements: Platform ingests county-level tax assessment data assigning clear historical context to properties
Displays previous sale dates, recorded deed transfers, and historical listing prices

FR-16.title: In-App Direct Messaging
requirements: Consumers initiate chats with Listing Agents securely through the platform without exposing personal phone numbers initially
Supports basic text and sharing listing URL snippets

FR-17.title: Tour Scheduling Engine
requirements: Buyers request 'In-Person' or 'Virtual' tours blocking off calendar availability
Agent dashboard requires accepting or proposing a new time slot seamlessly

FR-18.title: Agent Light CRM Toolkit
requirements: Agents view all inbound leads, toured clients, and current negotiations in a Kanban board style pipeline
Allows agents to record private notes and log external calls

FR-19.title: Open House RSVPs & Sign-Ins
requirements: Agents configure upcoming open houses surfacing them explicitly on the consumer map interface
App generates a QR code allowing physical walk-ins to register into the Agent's CRM instantly upon scanning

FR-20.title: Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) Generator
requirements: Agents select a target home and manually flag 3-4 'Comps' (comparables) creating a rapid PDF appraisal presentation for clients
System formats aesthetic PDF securely delivering it to the lead via email

FR-21.title: Tenant Rental Application Workflows
requirements: Renters apply directly on rental listings supplying basic employment details, references, and income history
Manager dashboards track explicit states ('Pending Verification', 'Approved', 'Rejected')

FR-22.title: Background Checks & Credit Screening
requirements: Renters explicitly authorize a soft credit pull integrating dynamically with TransUnion/Equifax API
Landlords view a synthesized pass/fail report alongside normalized credit scores protecting the renter's naked SSN

FR-23.title: Digital Leases & E-Signatures
requirements: Landlords generate standard lease PDFs inserting dynamic fields (Dates, Rent amounts, Security Deposit)
Integrates DocuSign or HelloSign API to capture legally binding signatures digitally from all parties

FR-24.title: Rent Collection & Split Payments
requirements: Tenants configure ACH bank transfers or Credit Cards securely to disburse monthly rent
Roommates can explicitly 'Split' rent balances distributing the charge across multiple independent profiles securely

FR-25.title: Landlord Stripe Connect Payouts
requirements: Collected rent distributes explicitly using Stripe Custom Connect directly into the Landlord's verified bank account
System automatically subtracts platform processing utility fees natively

FR-26.title: Maintenance Request Ticketing
requirements: Tenants file repair tickets natively attaching photos of damages
Landlords update status ('Received', 'Contractor Dispatched', 'Resolved') natively notifying the tenant

FR-27.title: Multi-Family Community Boards
requirements: Large apartment complexes feature a targeted forum allowing verified tenants to post announcements or sell items
Property Managers execute explicit moderation rights suspending explicit text

FR-28.title: Agent Monitization & Boosted Listings
requirements: Platform monetizes directly allowing agents to purchase 'Featured' flags dynamically forcing their inventory to the top of standard search indexes
Supports recurring monthly Pro subscriptions yielding advanced CRM metrics

FR-29.title: SEO & Dynamic Neighborhood Pages
requirements: System continuously builds static Next.js pages for specific cities and neighborhoods explicitly formatting rich HTML tags optimizing major search engine scraping operations natively

FR-30.title: Admin Dispute & Moderation Control
requirements: Admins view flagged listings investigating potentially fraudulent rentals or fake properties
Capable of locking out malicious accounts gracefully discarding active listings natively

NFR-01.title: Geospatial Performance
requirements: PostGIS indexing must process polygon inclusion mapping requests traversing 100,000+ coordinates safely under 400ms
Dynamic map clustering happens entirely client side explicitly preventing heavy repetitive server load natively

NFR-02.title: Security & Compliance
requirements: Real Estate listings must universally adhere natively to Fair Housing Laws explicitly restricting demographic targeting parameters securely
All integrated payment routes comply strongly strictly enforcing PCI DSS protocols locally

system_attributes.scalability: Image processing delegates seamlessly executing heavy resizing jobs asynchronously across ActiveStorage and Sidekiq completely off the main thread natively.
system_attributes.reliability: Stripe webhooks capture idempotency keys dynamically aggressively preventing unintended duplicate rent charges effectively handling network retransmissions safely.
